perksWithImages.name: Dead Man’s Switch
perksWithImages.description: When you hook a Survivor, the first time a Survivor stops repairing a Generator, it is blocked for {Tunable.K19P02.GeneratorBlockDuration}s. Cooldown: {Tunable.K19P02.GeneratorBlockDuration}s.

perksWithImages.name: Dominance
perksWithImages.description: The first time each Chest is being unlocked and each Totem is being blessed or cleansed by a Survivor, it is blocked for {Tunable.K37P03.BlockDuration}s.

perksWithImages.name: Wicked
perksWithImages.description:
While in the Basement, you can unhook yourself.

Whenever you are unhooked, you see the Killer's Aura for {Tunable.S41P03.AuraRevealDuration}s.

perksWithImages.name: Road Life
perksWithImages.description:
While injured, not Broken and repairing a Generator:
  • Whenever you hit a basic great Skill Check, you earn {Tunable.S49P01.TokenPerSkillCheck} Token.
  • Whenever you miss a basic Skill Check, you lose {Tunable.S49P01.TokensLostOnSkillCheckFail} token.


When you have {Tunable.S49P01.MaxTokens} Tokens, spend all Tokens to heal {Tunable.S49P01.HealingSpeedIncrease%}% faster until you stop healing.
